nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1987; const int b = 2079; const int c = 2104; const int d = 2123; const int e = 2138; const int f = 2152; const int g = 2164; const int h = 2177; const int i = 2189; const int j = 2201; const int k = 2214; const int l = 2228; const int m = 2243; const int n = 2261; const int o = 2286; const int p = 2378;
